task_completion.description: Navigate to the Revenue Recognition window in iDempiere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active window, tab, or page title clearly shows 'Revenue Recognition'.

task_completion.description: Enter the rule name '12 Month Subscription'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'Name' contains the exact text '12 Month Subscription'.

task_completion.description: Enter the rule description 'Ratable recognition over 1 year period'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'Description' contains the text 'Ratable recognition over 1 year period' (or at least 'Ratable recognition').
A checkbox labeled 'Time based' or 'Is Time Based' is checked.
A dropdown or selection field labeled 'Frequency' or 'Recognition Frequency' has 'Month' selected.

task_completion.description: Save the new Revenue Recognition Rule record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Record Saved'), the record appearing in a list/grid view, or the save button appearing in a disabled/successful state.

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere web GUI to create the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the iDempiere web interface, not a terminal, SQL client, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual ERP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are typed into the proper form fields within the iDempiere application, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent is operating within the GardenWorld client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The top header, user profile area, or login context indicates 'GardenWorld' as the active client/tenant.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates in the iDempiere ERP system. The expected name is '12 Month Subscription'. The description must contain 'Ratable recognition'. Time-based recognition must be enabled (represented as a checked box in the UI, or 'Y' in the database). The recognition frequency must be set to Month (represented as 'Month' in the UI dropdown, or 'M' in the database).
